title: Starting a New Job
sentences: When I started my new job, I felt nervous and excited.
My manager showed me around the office on the first day.
Although the work was difficult, my colleagues were very helpful.
I had to figure out how the computer systems worked.
Because I asked a lot of questions, I learned quickly.
At first, I found it hard to keep up with the pace.
My team often stays late to finish important projects.
I try to speak up when I have a good idea.
After a few weeks, I started to feel more confident.
My manager said I was doing a great job.
Although the job is demanding, I really enjoy it.
